Metadata.title: Foshan Kehong Paper Products | Custom Paper Packaging Solutions
Metadata.description: Custom paper packaging manufacturer and food grade paper supplier for OEM paper packaging, cup fan blanks and export-ready B2B projects.
Metadata.keywords: custom paper packaging manufacturer, food grade paper supplier, OEM paper packaging, cup fan blank supplier, custom corrugated paperboard, fluted paper packaging material, food-grade paper packaging, paper cup fan blanks, custom paper box manufacturer

hero.title: Paper packaging materials from a reliable manufacturing partner.
hero.description: Founded in 2001, Kehong supplies corrugated paper, specialty paper, paper boxes, trays, cup fan blanks and custom packaging structures to brands, converters, distributors and packaging manufacturers worldwide.
hero.proof: Reliable supply, responsive sampling, consistent quality and flexible order quantities from Foshan.

products.title: Materials, packaging and finishing for every project.
products.description: Browse by product family, compare specifications and request a quote with confidence.

process.title: From board processing to finished packaging.
process.description: Our process combines consistent material handling, precise converting, clean finishing and dependable product protection.

dieCutting.title: Automatic die-cutting
dieCutting.text: Custom-shape cutting and precise creasing with smooth feeding and positioning.

corrugated.title: Corrugated board converting
corrugated.text: High-precision fluted board production with smooth surface and accurate slitting.

dyeing.title: Coloring and slitting
dyeing.text: Consistent color output, even feeding and multiple pattern options.

laminating.title: Lamination and coating
laminating.text: Paper-to-board lamination and film coating for dust-resistant and moisture-resistant products.

inquiry.title: Share your material, size, process and quantity. We will prepare a tailored quotation.
inquiry.description: Pricing depends on material, GSM, size, process, print colors, quantity and trade terms, so a clear project brief helps us quote accurately.
inquiry.message: Hello Kehong, I would like to request a quote for:

catalog.title: Product Catalog
catalog.description: Compare Kehong products by category, material, process and customization options.
catalog.noResults: No matching products. Reset the filters or send us your requirements.

detail.note: Final specifications and pricing are confirmed against approved samples or drawings.

contact.title: Contact Kehong
contact.description: Tell us your target material, size, process, quantity and application. We will outline the next steps for sampling or a quotation.
contact.requirements: Material, GSM, size and process notes

footer.tagline: Quality first · Integrity in every project · Long-term partnerships
